meta_title: For Freelancers: testing automation to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to testing automation and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Testing Automation to Scale SaaS Apps
content.seo_description: Stop building basic apps. Use this intermediate checklist to automate testing with Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver high-quality, scalable client work.
content.answer_block: To break past basic app limitations, implement automated regression testing. By integrating Antigravity for test generation and Claude Code for CLI-based execution, you shift from manual QA to a continuous delivery pipeline, ensuring your client projects remain bug-free, scalable, and highly professional while slashing your manual maintenance time by 80%.
content.intro:
You’ve been here: the client loves the prototype, but the moment you add a new feature, three others break. You’re trapped in a cycle of manual regression testing, spending more time fixing legacy code than building the high-value features that actually earn your paycheck. 

It’s time to move beyond 'basic' and start engineering systems that self-validate. By leveraging automated testing workflows, you stop being a developer who fixes bugs and start being an architect who ships reliable, production-grade SaaS solutions at scale.

steps.title: Analyze and Map Existing Logic
steps.description: Identify high-risk modules in your codebase. We need to define the boundaries of your core business logic before automating.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the provided codebase and generate a comprehensive map of core business logic functions that require unit test coverage for stability.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'analyze project structure and identify top 5 critical functions for testing'

steps.title: Generate Isolated Unit Tests
steps.description: Use Antigravity to create isolated test suites for the identified modules, ensuring zero dependency on external APIs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Jest unit tests for the identified functions. Ensure mocks are used for all external service calls and database interactions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate unit tests for identified functions and save to /tests'

steps.title: Configure Integration Test Suites
steps.description: Bridge the gap between modules. Ensure that your data flow between services remains intact during updates.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an integration test suite that verifies the data flow between the user authentication module and the payment processing endpoint.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create integration tests for auth-to-payment flow'

steps.title: Implement Automated Test Runners
steps.description: Use Claude Code to automate the execution of these tests whenever a commit is pushed to your development branch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provide a configuration script to integrate the generated test suites into a CI/CD pipeline.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'set up automated test execution script for terminal execution'

steps.title: Stress Testing for Edge Cases
steps.description: Push your application to the limit by automating input variations to uncover hidden runtime errors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of fuzz testing scenarios for the main API input handlers to identify potential crash vectors.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'execute fuzz testing suite on main API endpoints'

pro_tips: Always mock your database calls in tests to keep execution time under 500ms; slow tests are ignored tests.
Use 'Test-Driven Development' (TDD) for new features; write the failing test before you write the implementation code.
Tag your tests with @critical and @optional; run the critical suite on every save to maximize feedback speed.
Automate the generation of test reports to PDF; clients love seeing hard data proving their app is stable.
Never ship a hotfix without adding a regression test for that specific bug to prevent it from ever returning.
resources: CI/CD Best Practices for Freelancers: https://devops.com/ci-cd-basics
content.next_steps: Once your test suite is passing, integrate a pre-commit hook that prevents any code from being pushed to production unless all tests pass. This ensures your project stability remains at 100% permanently.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting manual QA steal your billable hours. Master the tools that turn you into a high-velocity, professional SaaS builder. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
